title: agastache mexicana
intro: Agastache mexicana, also known as Mexican hyssop or hummingbird mint, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Agastache mexicana include reducing fever, soothing respiratory issues, and treating digestive problems. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular choice for natural remedies.
